2603.25489.title: Translation Asymmetry in LLMs as a Data Augmentation Factor: A Case Study for 6 Romansh Language Varieties
2603.25489.paper_summary: Recent strategies for low-resource machine translation rely on LLMs to generate synthetic data from higher-resource languages. We find that this method fails for Romansh, because LLMs tend to confuse its 6 distinct language varieties. Our experiments show that instead, the direction of data augmentation should be aligned with the resource gradient between source and target language. This approach surpasses Gemini 3 Pro in the lowest-resource variety of Romansh by 23 BLEU. A human evaluation confirms that our experiments yield the first model that generates fluent translations in the individual Romansh varieties.
2603.25489.paper_summary_zh: 最近的低資源機器翻譯策略依賴大型語言模型（LLMs）從高資源語言生成合成數據。<lb/>我們發現這種方法對於羅曼什語無效，因為LLMs往往會混淆其六種不同的語言變體。<lb/>我們的實驗顯示，相反，數據增強的方向應該與源語言和目標語言之間的資源梯度對齊。<lb/>這種方法在羅曼什語最低資源變體中超越了Gemini 3 Pro，提升了23 BLEU。<lb/>人類評估確認我們的實驗產生了第一個能夠生成流暢翻譯的羅曼什語個別變體的模型。
2603.25489.author: Jannis Vamvas et.al.
2603.25489.authors: Jannis Vamvas, Ignacio Pérez Prat, Angela Heldstab, Dominic P. Fischer, Sina Ahmadi, Rico Sennrich
